title: lastrea abbreviata
intro: Lastrea abbreviata, also known as the abbreviated fern, is a type of fern species that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea abbreviata include its ability to treat fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Lastrea abbreviata plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
